TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cole Aldrich hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pkaki' kkska'. kawas te 1988, byacing te 10 ru 31 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Minnesota, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 211 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 115 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2010 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu New Orleans Hornets. Cole Aldrich mqaws beh minisutaco,pulumitun pqwasan biru. hiya ga blaq balay qutux unrokay. 2007 kawas Cole Aldrich ga te tzyu qsahuy ru te mtzyul mzyu mari unrokay maki Amerika. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ¶~ ®ole al*ri ¶~ ®ńß ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa pkaki Ē kks~…ēka Ē. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te ** ru ** rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a minnes~…ēota, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, *** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. kawas~…ē **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari …£a, mzjup s~…ēqu te qutux lańßuj ru te ma…£al s~…ēquliq, …£alun nqu new orleans~…ē ńßornets~…ē. ¶~ ®ole al*ri ¶~ ®ńß mqaws~…ē ő≤eńß minis~…ēuta ¶~ ®o,pulumitun pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. ńßija …£a ő≤laq ő≤alaj qutux unrokaj. **** kawas~…ē ¶~ ®ole al*ri ¶~ ®ńß …£a te tzju qs~…ēańßuj ru te mtzjul mzju mari unrokaj maki amerika. kinő≤lajqan pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an s~…ēa qnxan nija Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Cole Aldrich hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pkaki' kkska'. kawas te 1988, byacing te 10 ru 31 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Minnesota, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 211 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 115 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2010 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu New Orleans Hornets. Cole Aldrich mqaws beh minisutaco,pulumitun pqwasan biru. hiya ga blaq balay qutux unrokay. 2007 kawas Cole Aldrich ga te tzyu qsahuy ru te mtzyul mzyu mari unrokay maki Amerika. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
